name: My Precious Bad Luck
original_name: ดวงแบบนี้ไม่มีจู๋
overview: This kind of fortune does not have a penis. Lucky, a saleswoman from the Moo line who entrusts her life to predictions. She had to work at the same place as Chokbodee, her ex-boyfriend who had dragged her down. And he is the culprit. to prevent her and Guy, the son of the owner of the doctor's company.

trailers.title: [OFFICIAL TRAILER] ละคร ดวงแบบนี้ไม่มีจู๋
